title: Section 13
content: A member of a local board or of a district board may resign by notifying in writing his intention to do so to 1[Commissioner]; and, on the acceptance by 1[Commissioner] of such resignation, the member shall be deemed to have vacated his office.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 4 of 1914, s. 2 and the Schedule, for "the local Government".
